title: Waveform Challenge #1
question: Given clk, rst_n, en, and d/q behavior, predict q after the marked edge.
answer: After reset deasserts, q updates only on active clock edges when enable is high.
explanation: Track state only on active edges and ignore data changes between sampling instants.
